cards.quote: I could find you a new daddy right now.

cards.name: Updated Model Stream
cards.effect: When Played: If you have an Upgraded Persona gain 2 [Bit].
cards.quote: [BIGGER]

cards.name: Menhera Club
cards.effect: When Played: This card gains +10 [Influence] this round. [Kickback] Gain 3 [Bit].
cards.quote: Normal people with normal brains just don't exist in my world.

cards.name: Beating You With A Frying Pan ASMR
cards.effect: Return all Content cards in play to their owners' hands.
cards.quote: Look at what mommy made me do, chat!

cards.name: Sudden Rizz
cards.effect: Discard 1 card from your hand. Then, draw 2 cards.
cards.quote: I want you~

cards.name: Microphone Upgrade
cards.effect:
Play only during a clash
Your Persona gains +5 [Influence] this clash and you draw 2 cards.
cards.quote: Nasa pretty beam!

cards.name: Pinata
cards.effect:
Play only during a clash.
If you are [Dominating] this Platform, you win this clash.
cards.quote: Tie each other to a tree and pretend to be a pinata.

cards.name: Throbbing Egghead
cards.effect:
Captain Camille's deck only.
Your Persona gains +5 [Influence] this round. Draw 1 card for each Platform where you are [Dominating].
cards.quote: When I speak, it pulsates.

cards.name: Hot Sauce Karaoke
cards.effect:
Raelice's deck only.
This card gains +1 [Influence] for each card in your Trash.
cards.quote: *Uncontrollable Coughing*

cards.name: Hard Pivot
cards.effect:
Discard any number of cards from your hand.
Then, draw that many cards.
cards.quote: New Content. New Me.

cards.name: Convenience Store
cards.effect: While this is your only Content card on this Platform: This card gains +3 [Influence].
cards.quote: We a bunch of crackheads.

cards.name: Be More Cultured
cards.effect: Reveal the top card of your deck. Return 1 opposing Content card cost less than or equal to that card's cost to it's owner's hand.
cards.quote: The Virgin Killer Sweater is way better than the Bee Movie.

cards.name: Porcelain Maid
cards.effect: [Clash Reward] Draw 1 card for each Platform where you have 1 or more Content cards. Then, discard that many cards.

cards.name: Porcelain Maid
cards.effect: [Clash Reward] Draw 1 card for each Platform where you have 1 or more Content cards. Then, discard that many cards minus 1. [Discard] Gain 1 [Bit].

cards.name: Remove Ball-Jointed Head
cards.effect:
Porcelain Maid's deck only.
Each opponent discards 1 card from their hand. Draw 1 card for each card discarded this way.
cards.quote: My eyes are down here.

cards.name: LineChu
cards.effect: While you have a face-up Premium Content card: LineChu gains +2 [Influence].

cards.name: LineChu
cards.effect: While you have a face-up Premium Content card: LineChu gains +2 [Influence]. Your Premium Content cards on LineChu's Platform can't be deleted by opposing effects. [Discard] Move your Persona to this Platform. Use only during a clash.

cards.name: 38+ Husbands
cards.effect:
LineChu's deck only.
When Played: You may flip a face-up Premium Content card on this Platform face-down.
cards.quote: I don't know if I feel as special...

cards.name: Eden
cards.effect: Your Content cards with [4 Cost] or less on this Platform gain +1 [Influence].

cards.name: Eden
cards.effect: Your Content cards with [4 Cost] or less on this Platform gain +2 [Influence]. [Discard] Your Persona gains +2 [Influence] this clash.

cards.name: Crystal Dragon Memories
cards.effect:
Eden's deck only.
This card gains +4 [Influence] for each other Content card you have on this Platform.
cards.quote: Without memories, the present moments lost their value.

cards.name: Raelice
cards.effect: [Clash Reward] You may discard the top 2 cards of your deck.

cards.name: Raelice
cards.effect: When Played: You may play 1 Content card from Trash on a Platform where you have no Content cards, reducing its cost by [3 Cost]. [Clash Reward] You may discard the top 2 cards of your deck. [Discard] Gain 1 [Bit] .

cards.name: Off the Raelz
cards.effect:
Raelice's deck only.
Reveal the top 3 cards of your deck. Draw 1 Content card from among them, then discard the others.
cards.quote: So about that tier list...

cards.name: Captain Camille
cards.effect: While you are [Dominating] 1 or more Platforms: Captain Camille gains +2 [Influence].

cards.name: Captain Camille
cards.effect: When Played: You may delete 1 opposing Content card on this Platform with [2 Cost] or less. While you are [Dominating] 1 or more Platforms: Captain Camille gains +3 [Influence]. [Discard] Move your Persona to this Platform. Use only during a clash.

cards.name: Vaseline On Toast
cards.effect:
Captain Camille's deck only.
While you are [Dominating] this Platform: you gain +3 [Influence] at each adjacent Platform.
cards.quote: It doesn't taste as bad as it sounds.

cards.name: La Avispa Nectarina
cards.effect:
Play with top card of your deck revealed.
This card gains [Influence] equal to the cost of the revealed card.

cards.name: La Avispa Nectarina
cards.effect: Play with the top card of your deck revealed. This card gains [Influence] equal to the cost of the revealed card. When Played: Look at the top 3 cards of your deck and put them back on the top of your deck in any order. [Discard] Your Persona gains +2 [Influence] this clash.

cards.name: Bug Burger Cooking Stream
cards.effect:
La Avispa Nectarina's deck only.
This card's [Influence] is equal to your Persona's [Influence].
cards.quote: Bugs are soulless, so I eat them without guilt!

cards.name: Gamer Gene
cards.effect: [Premium Content] Flip Condition: An opponent has a Content card with [4 Cost] or more on this Platform.
cards.quote: I play video games but you know, BADLY.

cards.name: AVId Gummy Worm Enjoyer
cards.effect:
La Avispa Nectarina's deck only.
While this card is revealed as the top of your deck: you my play this card for free. Your Persona gains +10 [Influence] this round.
cards.quote: I eat them till it HURTS.

cards.name: Pipkin Pippa
cards.effect: [Clash Reward] Gain 3 [Bit]. [Discard] Your Persona gains +2 [Influence] this clash.

cards.name: Pippa The Rippa
cards.effect:
Play only if your Persona is Pipkin Pippa.
[Clash Reward] You may play 1 Content card with [3 Cost] or less on Pipkin Pippa's Platform for free.
cards.quote: Here I come, a mega idol!

cards.name: Vomit Drawer
cards.effect: Delete 1 opposing Content card with 6 [Influence] or less.
cards.quote: There's no mold and no more vomit drawer.

cards.name: Tenma Maemi
cards.effect:
[Clash Reward] Draw 2 cards, then discard 1 card.
[Discard] Gain 1 [Bit].

cards.name: Depressed Single Divorced Fathers
cards.effect: When you play another Content card on this Platform: You may move this card to another Platform.
cards.quote: I want to make them worse.

cards.name: FAQ YU
cards.effect:
Play only if your Persona is Tenma Maemi.
1 Persona or Content card of your choice gains [Influence] equal to the number of cards in your hand this round.
cards.quote: Think you're funny? Hows this for funny!

cards.effect: [Clash Reward] Gain 1 [Bit].

cards.effect: Pipkin Pippa gains +2[Influence] for each Platform Where you have a Content card. [Clash Reward] Gain 3[Bit]. [Discard] Your Persona gains +2 [Influence] this clash.

cards.effect: The first time you play an Action card each round: Hakushika Iori +4 [Influence] this round and you draw 1 card. [Discard] Gain 1 [Bit].

cards.name: Utatane Nasa
cards.effect: While you have 0 [Bit]: Utatane Nasa gains +5 [Influence]. [Activate] Spend 3 [Bit], Draw 2 card. [Discard] Move your Persona to this Platform. Use only during a clash.

cards.effect: While you have 5 or more cards in your hands: Tenma Maemi gains +4 [Influence]. [Clash Reward] Draw 2 cards. [Discard] Gain 1 [Bit].

cards.name: Rinkou Ashelia
cards.effect: The first time you play a Content card each round: Rinkou Ashelia gains +4 [Influence] this round and you draw 1 card. [Discard] Move your Persona to this Platform. Use only during a clash.

cards.effect: While you have exactly 1 Content card on this Platform: Fujikura Uruka gains +5 [Influence]. [Activate], delete 1 of your Content cards on any Platform: Draw 2 cards. [Discard] Your Persona gains +2 [Influence] this clash.

cards.name: Sakana
cards.effect: [Activate] Eat a Phase Connect Coffee Bean: This card gains +5 [Influence] this round. Limit 2 per round. Limit 25 per 24 hours. (Please consume responsibly)

cards.name: Phase Warehouse
cards.effect: Phase Connect deck only. When you play an Action card on this Platform: Your Persona gains +1 [Influence] for every Phase Connect Merch on your person this round.

cards.name: Buy Out Artist Alley
cards.effect: Every Creative Content card on all Platforms gains +2 [Bit] this round. If your Persona is Sakana, they gain +3 [Bit] instead.
cards.quote: Vendors, Phase Connect's got you covered!
